Fanny.name: Fanny
Fanny.skill_combo: Cable Drift (Skill 1) onto a wall to gain Steel Cable stacks, then Cut Throat (Skill 2) to dash and slash, finishing with Ultimate (Steel Cable Dance) on a grouped target.

Granger.name: Granger
Granger.skill_combo: Use Skill 1 (Rhapsody) to reload while moving, Skill 2 (Crescendo) to immobilize and burst, then auto-attack reset.

Lancelot.name: Lancelot
Lancelot.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Puncture Spear) to gain a shield and dash, Skill 2 (Coup De Grace) to dash again and slow, then Ultimate (Glory Dance) for invincible burst damage.

Angela.name: Angela
Angela.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Heart Shock) for poke and slow, Skill 2 (Touch of Heart) to peel for allies, Ultimate (Love Waves) to merge with a damage-dealing teammate.

Tigreal.name: Tigreal
Tigreal.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Sacred Bull) to charge and stun, Skill 2 (Attention) to taunt enemies, Ultimate (Implosion) to pull and group the enemy team for follow-up.

Gusion.name: Gusion
Gusion.skill_combo: Skill 2 (Sword Glare) to throw daggers, Skill 1 (Multiple Sword) to dash and reset, Ultimate (Thorned Rose) to slow and finish, retrieving daggers for cooldown reset.

Chou.name: Chou
Chou.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Jab) to poke and reposition, Skill 2 (Shunpo) to dash in, Ultimate (Savage Kick) to kick enemies into your team's burst.

Ling.name: Ling
Ling.skill_combo: Use Skill 1 (Wind Blade) for sustained attack stacks, Skill 2 (Wall Walk) to reach elevated terrain for surprise dives, Ultimate (Sword Trace) to reset on kills.

Kagura.name: Kagura
Kagura.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Rasho Umbrella) to throw and pull back, Skill 2 (Seimei Oboro) to dash through the umbrella for burst, Ultimate (Garyo Tensei) for an unblockable line nuke.

Esmeralda.name: Esmeralda
Esmeralda.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Forbidden Crystal) to mark for shield-stealing, Skill 2 (Astral Spirit) to roam and engage, Ultimate (Pendulum of Destiny) to absorb shields and burst.

Lesley.name: Lesley
Lesley.skill_combo: Stay in Stealth Shot for bonus damage on Skill 1 (Master of Sniper), use Skill 2 (Disable) to escape, Ultimate (Ace of the Sniper) to one-shot squishy targets.

Karrie.name: Karrie
Karrie.skill_combo: Skill 2 (Steel Wave) to pierce and weaken armor, true-damage autos pierce regen shields, Ultimate (Pursuit) to dash and slow groups.

Khufra.name: Khufra
Khufra.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Spinning Roll) to engage, Skill 2 (Bouncing Ball) to knock up and stun, Ultimate (Tyrant's Rage) to root channelers (great vs Fanny/Gusion/Selena).

Mathilda.name: Mathilda
Mathilda.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Pulling Wind) to root and dash, Skill 2 (Flowing Time) to grant allies movement speed and shield, Ultimate (Space-time Travel) to reposition the whole team.

Yu Zhong.name: Yu Zhong
Yu Zhong.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Blood Sea) to mark targets, Skill 2 (Surging Waves) to dash, Ultimate (Dragon's Wrath) to fly and slam down for area burst and lifesteal.

Paquito.name: Paquito
Paquito.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Smart Combo) chains into different finishers based on input, Skill 2 (Heavy Punch) to knock back, Ultimate (Explosive Spike) to launch enemies for team follow-up.

Hayabusa.name: Hayabusa
Hayabusa.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Shadow Kill) to deploy shadows, Skill 2 (Phantom Shuriken) to slow, Ultimate (Phantom Ninjutsu) to teleport between shadows for repositioning and burst.

Saber.name: Saber
Saber.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Triple Sweep) to mark, Skill 2 (Shadow Spear) to dash and pull, Ultimate (Star Shattering Blade) to lock down and execute a single squishy target.

Layla.name: Layla
Layla.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Malefic Bomb) to poke, Skill 2 (Void Projectile) for a piercing line of damage, Ultimate (Destruction Dive) for a long-range execute.

Miya.name: Miya
Miya.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Rain of Arrows) for wave clear, Skill 2 (Hawkeye) for true damage burst, Ultimate (Hidden Moonlight) for stealth repositioning before engaging.

Alucard.name: Alucard
Alucard.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Groundsplitter) to dash and slow, Skill 2 (Whirling Smash) for sustained area damage and lifesteal, Ultimate (Fission Wave) to dash for a kill reset.

Zilong.name: Zilong
Zilong.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Spear Strike) to dash, Skill 2 (Supreme Warrior) for an attack speed buff, Ultimate (Heroic Charge) to leap in and stun for follow-up.

Fredrinn.name: Fredrinn
Fredrinn.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Searing Sword) to mark, Skill 2 (Eye of Vichama) to gain Wrath stacks, Ultimate (Falling Severity) to dive and execute marked targets.

Joy.name: Joy
Joy.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Dance of Stars) to bounce off enemies, Skill 2 (Aurora Blade) to gain a shield, Ultimate (Strings of Fate) to tether and slow grouped enemies.

Arlott.name: Arlott
Arlott.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Wind Edge) to dash and mark, Skill 2 (Crow Sanctuary) to summon crows for vision and damage, Ultimate (Indomitable Will) to dash through enemies for burst.

Suyou.name: Suyou
Suyou.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Pesky Toolbox) to slow and reset, Skill 2 (Spike Slash) for burst and execute on low-HP targets, Ultimate (Stealthy Tools) for vision and team utility.

Lukas.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Soaring Slam) to dash and reset cooldown on hit, Skill 2 (Spinning Blades) for area damage, Ultimate (Tag Team) to mark and chain dashes onto enemies.

Clint.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Gunslinger) to auto-reset attack with slow, Skill 2 (Smoke Bomb) to escape and stun, Ultimate (Grenade) to lob explosives.

Natalia.name: Natalia
Natalia.skill_combo: Stealth (passive) to roam unseen, Skill 1 (Claw Dash) to mark and dash, Skill 2 (Assassinate) for execute burst, Ultimate (Shadow Strike) to reset.

Claude.name: Claude
Claude.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Massive Cannon) to pierce, Skill 2 (Art of Sniping) for high burst, Ultimate (Cross Shot) for a deadly beam.

Helcurt.name: Helcurt
Helcurt.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Shadows) to dash and mark, Skill 2 (Shadow Assault) for burst and slow, Ultimate (Total Darkness) to blind and engage.

Estes.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Holy Blessing) to heal allies, Skill 2 (Sanctity) for team shield, Ultimate (Divine Blessing) for massive group heal.

Selena.name: Selena

Harith.name: Harith
Harith.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Zaman Force) to dash and slow, Skill 2 (Chronosphere) to manipulate space, Ultimate (Rewind) to reset position and cooldowns.

Badang.name: Badang
Badang.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Fist Crack) to punch and slow, Skill 2 (Heavy Spin) for area damage, Ultimate (Badang's Fist) to launch a massive shockwave.

Valir.name: Valir

Martis.name: Martis
Martis.skill_combo: Skill 1 (Divine Wrath) to slash, Skill 2 (Healing Light) for sustain, Ultimate (Sword of Light) to execute and heal.

Lylia.name: Lylia

Lunox.name: Lunox
